name: Asparagus Wrap
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the bottom end of each asparagus spear and blanch in boiling water.
2. In a small bowl, blend together the mustard and mayonnaise.
3. Spread the mustard mixture evenly on each bologna slice.
4. Wrap one trimmed asparagus spear around each bologna slice.
5. Place the slices in a single layer on a round microwave-safe platter or plate, covering lightly with paper towels.
6. Cook in the microwave at medium power for 1 minute, or until hot. Rotate the plate halfway through cooking.
One Serving: Calories: 86; Carbohydrates: 2; Exchange Category: High-Fat Meat
